name: Hankook Tire & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hankook Tire & Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures, distributes, and sells tires, tubes, and alloy wheels worldwide. It provides tires for passenger cars, SUVs, light trucks, buses, and trucks, as well as competition tires. The company is also involved in the manufacture and sale of tire molds and injection molds; trading and consulting; facilities management service and backing; and computer printing activities. It provides its products under the Hankook, Laufenn, and Kingstar brands. The company was formerly known as Hankook Tire Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hankook Tire & Technology Co., Ltd. in May 2019. Hankook Tire Co., Ltd. was founded in 1941 and is headquartered in Seongnam-si, South Korea.
